# strokeEnd

**Interface Property**

The unit distance along the line where a stroke ends.

## Declaration

```swift
strokeEnd?: number;
```

## Discussion

The value of this property must be a number between `0` and `1`. A value of `0` represents the beginning of the polyline, and a value of `1,` the default, represents the end. MapKit JS interprets values between `0` and `1` linearly along the length of the polyline.

The stroke is only visible for the overlay when [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/StyleConstructorOptions/strokeStart] is less than [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/StyleConstructorOptions/strokeEnd].

## Setting stroke styles

- **strokeColor**: The stroke color of a line.
- **strokeOpacity**: The opacity of the stroke color.
- **strokeStart**: The unit distance along the line where a stroke begins.
- **lineGradient**: The gradient to apply along the line.
